title: Pattern Dojo
description: Master the 18 algorithm patterns behind the NeetCode 150 — intuitively and interactively. 18 step-through visualizers (keyboard-driven, with shareable deep-links to any frame), a pattern-recognition trainer, and a full SM-2 spaced-repetition engine: mark a pattern learned and it enters a review schedule with mastery tracking, a daily review dashboard, pattern-of-the-day, streaks, guided per-problem approaches, a printable complexity cheat-sheet, a ⌘K command palette, and a light/dark theme.
